title: Business Valuation in Puducherry | Virtual Auditor
description: Business Valuation in Puducherry. From ₹50,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. IBBI-compliant business valuation using DCF, market approach. Contact +91 99622 603
bodyText:
What is business valuation services? IBBI-compliant business valuation using DCF, market approach, NAV. For M&A, fundraising, tax compliance, FEMA, IBC.
Business Valuation Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Puducherry, Puducherry since 2012.
Quick Answer: Business Valuation in Puducherry — IBBI-compliant business valuation using DCF, market approach, NAV. For M&A, fundraising, tax complia. From ₹50,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Business Valuation Services in Puducherry
Virtual Auditor provides business valuation services across Puducherry. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Puducherry with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Chennai handles company registrations and filings for Puducherry. Stamp duty: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

HEADING2: Our Service Scope
• DCF Valuation (Discounted Cash Flow)
• Comparable Company Analysis
• NAV (Net Asset Value) Method
• FEMA/FDI Valuation (Rule 11UA)
• ESOP Valuation (Ind AS 102)
• 409A Valuation
• IBC Valuation (Reg. 35)
• Fairness Opinion

HEADING2: Step-by-Step Process
• 1
HEADING3: Step 1: Scope Definition
Identify valuation purpose, standard of value, premise
• 2
HEADING3: Step 2: Data Collection
Financial statements, projections, market data
• 3
HEADING3: Step 3: Analysis
Apply 3-5 valuation methods with Monte Carlo simulation
• 4
HEADING3: Step 4: Draft Report
Prepare IBBI-compliant valuation report
• 5
HEADING3: Step 5: Final Report
Incorporate feedback and issue signed report

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Puducherry
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your business valuation is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.
Technology that accelerates: Automated compliance calendars, AI-assisted document analysis, and 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations for valuations.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: What is an IBBI Registered Valuer?
faqs.a: A professional registered with IBBI under the Registered Valuers Regulations, 2017. Required for valuations under Companies Act and IBC.

faqs.q: How many valuation methods do you use?
faqs.a: We use up to 18 methods with 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations per engagement for statistically defensible results.

faqs.q: How long does a valuation report take?
faqs.a: Standard reports in 7-10 working days. Complex multi-framework valuations may take 15-20 days.

faqs.q: Do you provide business valuation services in Puducherry?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Puducherry from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Puducherry?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Puducherry fall under ROC Chennai. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Puducherry-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Puducherry?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Puducherry: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
